_comment: REFERENCE DATA — domains named in PUBLISHED, ATTRIBUTED influence-operation takedown reports or datasets (e.g. platform CIB disclosures, EU DisinfoLab, Stanford Internet Observatory, DFRLab). ORGANIZATIONS / INFRASTRUCTURE ONLY — never persons. Ships EMPTY. Populate ONLY from published reports; every entry MUST carry `disclosedBy` (the publisher) and a `report` provenance URL. Overlap is a LEAD for a human analyst, not a verdict: a domain once named in a report can later be dormant, reassigned, or legitimately cited.
